name: Sade
bio: Sade's catalog continues to monetize through calm-playlist dominance, enduring vocal recognition, and deep catalog loyalty across decades.
notable_for: Elegant recordings with exceptional long-tail replay value.
career_highlight: Signature songs continue to perform strongly across streaming, late-night playlists, and sync-sensitive use cases.
revenue_drivers: Streaming playlists focused on calm, soul, and late-night listening support recurring revenue.
Cross-generational listener familiarity keeps the core catalog active.
Selective sync use and prestige cultural placement support long-tail value.
